---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: 提议新功能或改进 | Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] <功能简述>'
labels: 'enhancement, needs-discussion'
assignees: ''
---

## ✨ 功能描述 | Feature Description

**清晰简洁地描述你想要的功能。**
**Clearly and concisely describe the feature you want.**

---

## 🎯 用例与动机 | Use Cases & Motivation

**这个功能解决了什么问题？为什么需要它？**
**What problem does this solve? Why is it needed?**

- **用例 1 Use Case 1**: ...
- **用例 2 Use Case 2**: ...
- **用例 3 Use Case 3**: ...

---

## 💡 建议实现 | Proposed Solution

**你希望这个功能如何工作？**
**How do you expect this feature to work?**

---

## 🔄 替代方案 | Alternative Solutions

**你是否考虑过其他解决方案？**
**Have you considered any alternative solutions?**

---

## 📊 优先级评估 | Priority Assessment

请选择此功能的优先级 | Please select the priority of this feature:

- [ ] 🔴 **紧急 Critical** - 阻塞性问题，必须立即解决
- [ ] 🟠 **高 High** - 重要功能，应尽快实现
- [ ] 🟡 **中 Medium** - 有价值但非紧急
- [ ] 🟢 **低 Low** - 锦上添花，可延后考虑

---

## 🛠️ 技术可行性 | Technical Feasibility

**如果你有技术背景，可以提供：**
**If you have technical background, you can provide:**

- **预期影响范围 Expected Impact**: ...
- **技术挑战 Technical Challenges**: ...
- **参考实现 Reference Implementation**: ...

---

## 📚 参考资源 | References

**是否有其他项目实现了类似功能？**
**Are there other projects that have implemented similar features?**

- **参考链接 Reference Link 1**: ...
- **参考链接 Reference Link 2**: ...

---

**感谢你的建议！💡**
**Thank you for your suggestion!**

*YYC³ 团队将认真评估此功能请求*
*The YYC³ team will carefully evaluate this feature request*

</div>
